message:
test(fj-conformance): add 32 oracle tests for ReduceProd primitive

Comprehensive conformance tests for Primitive::ReduceProd covering:
- Basic 1D full reduction (factorial: 1*2*3*4*5 = 120)
- Zero absorption (any zero makes product zero)
- Negative number sign rules (even/odd negatives)
- 2D and 3D full reductions
- Axis reduction (axis 0, 1, 2, and multiple axes)
- Float products with fractions
- Special float values: infinity, underflow, NaN propagation
- inf * 0 = NaN edge case
- Large values and powers of two
- Associativity verification

Previously only 1 test existed in lax_oracle.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
